ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the project entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the project entity (e.g., Web App Development, Security Services) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the project (Open/Closed) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the project is implemented */,
  "ref_no" TEXT /* Reference number assigned to the project */,
  "beneficiary_group" TEXT /* Group of beneficiaries the project addresses */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the project is applied */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "external_db_link" TEXT /* Link to external database for additional data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_beneficiary_group FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_group") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_group"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES project_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary group */,
  "beneficiary_group" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beneficiary group */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the beneficiary group */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the beneficiary group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type (e.g., Web App Development, Security Services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project type (e.g., Infrastructure, Education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Apply, Partnership) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "partner_org" TEXT /* Partner organization if the source is a partnership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being managed */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the management update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes on project management and current status */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps planned for the project */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the update */,
  "progress_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of project progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_management_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_management_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
